'''âb-s-s''' ('''kabasas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:codeliver|codeliver]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:codeliver|codeliver]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-s-s
|-
! Lemma
| kabasas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibasas|thibasas]] || [[word:jibasas|jibasas]] || [[word:shibasas|shibasas]] || [[word:kibasas|kibasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubasas|thuthubasas]] || [[word:jujubasas|jujubasas]] || [[word:shushubasas|shushubasas]] || [[word:kukubasas|kukubasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubasas|thubasas]] || [[word:jubasas|jubasas]] || [[word:shubasas|shubasas]] || [[word:kubasas|kubasas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubasas|thubasas]] || [[word:jubasas|jubasas]] || [[word:shubasas|shubasas]] || [[word:kubasas|kubasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebasas|thebasas]] || [[word:jebasas|jebasas]] || [[word:shebasas|shebasas]] || [[word:kebasas|kebasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobasas|thothobasas]] || [[word:jojobasas|jojobasas]] || [[word:shoshobasas|shoshobasas]] || [[word:kokobasas|kokobasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobasas|thobasas]] || [[word:jobasas|jobasas]] || [[word:shobasas|shobasas]] || [[word:kobasas|kobasas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobasas|thobasas]] || [[word:jobasas|jobasas]] || [[word:shobasas|shobasas]] || [[word:kobasas|kobasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbasas|thĂŠbasas]] || [[word:jĂŠbasas|jĂŠbasas]] || [[word:shĂŠbasas|shĂŠbasas]] || [[word:kĂŠbasas|kĂŠbasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabasas|thathabasas]] || [[word:jajabasas|jajabasas]] || [[word:shashabasas|shashabasas]] || [[word:kakabasas|kakabasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabasas|thabasas]] || [[word:jabasas|jabasas]] || [[word:shabasas|shabasas]] || [[word:kabasas|kabasas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabasas|thabasas]] || [[word:jabasas|jabasas]] || [[word:shabasas|shabasas]] || [[word:kabasas|kabasas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabasas|shabasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabasas|goshabasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabasas|gokishabasas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabasasnĂŒ|shabasasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabasasnknĂŒ|goshabasasnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasasnĂŒ|gokishabasasnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabasashĂ«|shabasashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabasasnkshĂ«|goshabasasnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabasashĂ«|gokishabasashĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasasro|shabasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasasnkro|goshabasasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasasro|gokishabasasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasasmu|shabasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasasnkmu|goshabasasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasasmu|gokishabasasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabasasher|shabasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabasasnksher|goshabasasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabasasher|gokishabasasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabasasng|shabasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabasasnkng|goshabasasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabasasng|gokishabasasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabasasya|shabasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabasasnkya|goshabasasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabasasya|gokishabasasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabasasyam|shabasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabasasnkyam|goshabasasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabasasyam|gokishabasasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasasnĂŒshĂ«|shabasasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasasnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabasasnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasasnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabasasnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasasnĂŒro|shabasasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasasnknĂŒro|goshabasasnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasasnĂŒro|gokishabasasnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasasnĂŒmu|shabasasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasasnknĂŒmu|goshabasasnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasasnĂŒmu|gokishabasasnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasashĂ«nĂŒ|shabasashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasasnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabasasnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasashĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabasashĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasashĂ«ro|shabasashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasasnkshĂ«ro|goshabasasnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasashĂ«ro|gokishabasashĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasashĂ«mu|shabasashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasasnkshĂ«mu|goshabasasnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasashĂ«mu|gokishabasashĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasasronĂŒ|shabasasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasasnkronĂŒ|goshabasasnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasasronĂŒ|gokishabasasronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasasroshĂ«|shabasasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasasnkroshĂ«|goshabasasnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasasroshĂ«|gokishabasasroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabasasromu|shabasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabasasnkromu|goshabasasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabasasromu|gokishabasasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabasasmunĂŒ|shabasasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabasasnkmunĂŒ|goshabasasnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabasasmunĂŒ|gokishabasasmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabasasmushĂ«|shabasasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabasasnkmushĂ«|goshabasasnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabasasmushĂ«|gokishabasasmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabasasmuro|shabasasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabasasnkmuro|goshabasasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabasasmuro|gokishabasasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
